---
title: "MSP input Germany"
autogen: true
format:
  html:
    grid:
      sidebar-width: 250px
      body-width: 1500px
      margin-width: 0px
      gutter-width: 1.5rem
---

NA

::: {layout="[ [1] ]"}

```{=html}
<iframe style="border:none;" height="800" width="100%" src="https://viewer.openearth.nl/compendium-greater-north-sea-embedded/?folders=144094709,146619641&layers=146619838,146619765,146619730,146619715,146619708,146619692,146619659&layerNames=Defense%20plans%202021,Scientific%20Research%20plans%202021,Shipping%20plans%202021,Offshore%20Wind%20Energy%20plans%202021,Nature%20conservation%20plans%202021,Fishery%20plans%202021,Cables%20and%20Pipelines%20plans%202021"></iframe>
```

:::
